articles.title: Henry Nowak arrest footage raises 'serious questions for police', PM says
articles.description: Sir Keir Starmer says the question of "how accusations of racism informed decision making" must be addressed, as protesters clash with police in Southampton.

articles.title: Key moments from police bodycam footage
articles.description: BBC Verify has analysed bodycam footage that was released by the police of Henry Nowak after being stabbed by Vickrum Digwa.

articles.title: Three quarters of workers not on track for 'moderate' pension income, report suggests
articles.description: A newly-published report suggests a moderate lifestyle in retirement costs £32,700 for one person and £45,400 for two.

articles.title: US and Iran launch new strikes as ceasefire negotiations stall
articles.description: US launches fresh strikes on Iran and an oil tanker as Tehran says it attacked US air bases in the Gulf.
